textByHashes.0b298086cbd882374e94b268b4e30bd167f58923: I will return only when I have caught a Karambwan.
textByHashes.d649e5354815dbef2985fc142bba47079bbaa987: You don't know? The Karambwan is a species of octopus native to these waters.
textByHashes.6790db30f286f32d94369a42e071ffb669dd0a1b: They have a monopoly on its sale in the pirate town of Brimhaven.
textByHashes.d84ddd020f58aea58b31acbba7fa088a8fbb2307: At this rate, it could take forever.
textByHashes.d982ddd155edb6207afa415709d35faa14ec4979: Sometimes, oblivion is all I crave...
textByHashes.04513e5a9858c436c66687c1a132ae4adcffca46: I just don't know. You can try.
textByHashes.d2e1eea55eef7d875dc921929e632eea44f9c630: I'm trying to catch them with a net as they swim by.
textByHashes.f73413bfe57db9bc775cc8455f421dc8793668bc: They keep fighting loose of the twining.
textByHashes.fa54b1ba6803c8b52288f0b7b30db59644e5b8e5: I refuse to take your offerings. I must catch this Karambwan myself.
textByHashes.a67a5b6969c5264028b2af9410c7a9f1c1b86a8b: This vessel is useless! The Karambwan are not even interested in entering it!
textByHashes.c85d054530b8fe3ee5f314c0e1a0b533bc221fef: The Holy Friend? Bwana, it is sacrilege to feed these fish to Karambwan!
textByHashes.0d5017cc955fc8a7ce8e6ad6ccba2021646e77ae: This attracts many more Karambwan, but they still break free of the net.
textByHashes.9361ff41113594f20f139fb05f17cdeb21dd871c: Bwana! I cannot believe my eyes!
textByHashes.6b3226e9476db844d7a4de873dff05ae19742fc6: I, Tiadeche, who would never amount to anything, have managed to trap a Karambwan!
textByHashes.1541a9714d531865e9671dc140b57437c2eb85c0: Let me offer to you my first catch as a sign of gratitude.
textByHashes.5e4c6a5b2733537b7ebe1c06e820381073e7320f: Hmph ... my father would not care.
textByHashes.8bfc2319ec6fa622cf6b58b517dbd77d8ab50146: I cannot return just yet. We witness the change of a turning tide. The secrets of the Karambwan are to be unlocked!
textByHashes.c74ed73ca2dfe712737921c87e6241d78d4e94a9: Before I return, I must ask you to do one thing.
textByHashes.99223f46bf10189cfe69f4536f3eecb66f5402ad: Take a Karambwan vessel to my brother Tinsay. He is the academic amongst us. Tell him I have asked him to study it so that we may craft more of its type.
textByHashes.5cf7a1f9a7fdf83561f887326410eaf691090f34: I need this to practice with. Why don't you craft another one?
textByHashes.cac4ff48941df8c3fc7d26272dc51c6db53868f1: I have caught another Karambwan! I think I ought to give it to you.
textByHashes.3c5161b7000cf167687817bedf2b1b5eecbc5109: Have you taken the Karambwan vessel to Tinsay?
textByHashes.693dc010f4b0e52004c155149065e180fd8c4e41: Did you ask for crafting instructions as I said?
textByHashes.377d92a05138716826d56c3b95d0e91ab78bb052: Well go back and ask him to make another copy!
textByHashes.54e2e5f0f175401b738ab703bb4fb329eba21646: Thank you so much. You cannot understand what all of this means to me and our people.
textByHashes.6182746c897a6a862c111ef9d86348a47348e974: Yes. I will do as I promised.
textByHashes.5e594ef551142a286f34597698f01130ff76d1d9: Not yet. I will stay here a while to catch more Karambwan.
textByHashes.4e69704535d137a97ba52ce05777d4d35108b373: I will meet you in the village once you have helped my brothers and spoken to my father.
textByHashes.98824c904616e359be7442d92210903a03651fc5: Please hurry! Time is of the essence!
textByHashes.e55b0e749042c47b7784129e93ab64477260a81b: Hello, Bwana! We three have finally returned to the village!
textByHashes.d54ad1140d594ce2b17374374fdb2324f98a4c7c: I wish to reward you in return for helping me.
textByHashes.a5adca9d4869b937b795a8db9728d9a43916308b: I have been attempting to cook the Karambwan. As we all know, they are poisonous if not cooked properly.
textByHashes.18eb2c93b6b8273bb0b5416eae8a4713f0096885: Indeed. I have determined precisely how long to cook them for so that they are edible.
textByHashes.c9e45960f2ed8c160f9a44d8e168add738211b74: Thanks to you, Lubufu's Karambwan monopoly is over. If you ever need some, then come to me and not the store in Brimhaven.
textByHashes.63f04984b8a8e47eba61ccf56864c224a66455a9: Hello, Bwana! Would you like to buy some Karambwan?
textByHashes.1c2566eca697dd018312ecd3d61544b94f0b039e: Very well. Let me know if you change your mind.
